content:
- Executed task 33 (NOW EXECUTE): deep skeptical docs verification + writing-quality pass.
- Added docs verification section + report: docs/src/verification/index.md and docs/src/verification/task-33-docs-verification-report.md with coverage ledger, claim/evidence mapping, diagram audit ledger, terminology table.
- Corrected multiple diagrams and overclaims to match code reality (intent routed via DCS; debug routes gated by debug.enabled; removed misleading direct API->HA edges; clarified startup planner leader wording).
- Updated HA no-quorum stress mapping docs and fixed a test-long flake: e2e_no_quorum_fencing_blocks_post_cutoff_commits_and_preserves_integrity could fail after fencing because Postgres may be intentionally stopped; changed table integrity probe to best-effort across nodes and documented it.
- Ran and captured evidence logs (all green): make docs-build, make docs-hygiene, make lint, make check, make test, make test-long under .ralph/evidence/task-33-docs-factcheck/ (force-added ignored evidence).
- Updated AGENTS.md with learning about best-effort post-fencing integrity probes.
- Marked task 33 completed/passing, ran .ralph/task_switch.sh, committed and pushed.

- Next: pick up the next task from .ralph/current_tasks.md (current_task.txt removed by task_switch).
